name: Third party like equipment maker caused my injury in Centerville, can sue?

mainEntity.name: Third party like equipment maker caused my injury in Centerville, can sue?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, pursue negligence suit alongside comp for extras.** Prove duty/breach/causation[1][3][4]. **Key factors:** Comp lien on settlement; no pain from employer. **Practical guidance:** Identify party, file within 4 years, lawyer coordinates. **Often doubles recovery.**
